attacking_style: Prefers decisive attacks from masked positioning rather than early aggressive moves. Thrives in selective uphill sprints after hard racing has eliminated pure sprinters, typically capitalizing on late-race positioning.
team_tactics: Relies heavily on Jumbo-Visma domestiques for chase work and tempo control. Team commits resources to bringing back breaks before his decisive moves in finale, even when domestiques crash or are exhausted.
terrain_preference: Selective uphill finishes after brutal circuits or hard racing that eliminate pure sprinters. Circuit races with repeated climbs that allow accumulation of fatigue in rivals suit him perfectly.
vulnerability: High dependency on team support for chase work suggests vulnerability when isolated or when team is depleted. Masked positioning strategy requires functioning support structure throughout race.
key_patterns: Maintains back-of-pack positioning before decisive moves to mask form and conserve energy (2 races)
Peaks with consecutive stage wins showing superior form timing and energy management (2 races)
Wins selective sprints after teammates exhausted from chase efforts, exploiting late-race positioning (2 races)
Executes attacks at decisive moments rather than from distance, relying on explosive finish (2 races)
form_trajectory: positive: demonstrated peak form with third consecutive stage win at Tirreno-Adriatico, maintained ability to mask form and deliver decisive efforts through Giro
